name: Английский вариант отчета
sql:
SELECT id, region, category, product, manager, channel, sale_date, revenue, units, sale_year, sale_quarter, sale_month_name, sale_day_num, sale_weekday_name FROM sales_data_en where  (%(region)s::text[] IS NULL OR region = ANY(%(region)s::text[])) and 
(%(revenue)s IS NULL OR revenue = %(revenue)s)
columns_query: SELECT id, region, category, product, manager, channel, sale_date, revenue, units, sale_year, sale_quarter, sale_month_name, sale_day_num, sale_weekday_name FROM sales_data_en limit 0
